<!--
Thanks for contributing! A few things that keep PRs fast to merge:
  · One logical change per PR.
  · Tests where behavior changed.
  · Run `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` locally.
  · Link the issue this closes (if any).
-->

## What changed

<!-- One sentence on the user-visible change. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem this solves, or the issue this closes. -->

Closes #

## Surface

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Scoring (`@aeorank/core`)
- [ ] Generators (the 9 files)
- [ ] CLI (`aeorank-cli`)
- [ ] GitHub Action / App
- [ ] Dashboard (`apps/web`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm typecheck` pass
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] No new dependencies, or new deps justified in the description
